_comment: Music manifest - maps track IDs to audio files. SoundManager checks this before falling back to procedural generation.

overworld_medieval.title: The Realm Awakens
overworld_medieval.prompt: Peaceful Arthurian countryside, golden morning light over rolling green hills, earnest adventure beginning, slight melancholy undertone, a hero setting out on an uncertain journey, warm strings and gentle harp arpeggios building to a hopeful melody
overworld_medieval.style: 16-bit SNES orchestral, Nobuo Uematsu, Final Fantasy, harp, strings, adventurous

victory_test.title: Victory Fanfare
victory_test.prompt: Classic JRPG victory fanfare. Opens with a rising brass arpeggio C-E-G-C then resolves into a triumphant sustained chord. Transitions into an energetic rock celebration with power chords, galloping double kick drums, and a shredding lead guitar melody in E minor. Triumphant, celebratory, 140-160 BPM. Like Final Fantasy victory theme meets 80s metal. 15-30 seconds total.
victory_test.style: JRPG victory fanfare, 16-bit SNES brass, Final Fantasy, triumphant, short, chiptune, retro game music

sfx_critical_hit.title: Critical Hit
sfx_critical_hit.prompt: Heavy critical hit impact sound effect for a JRPG battle. Massive metallic slash with a deep reverberating boom. Screen-shaking impact, brief ringing aftermath. Powerful and satisfying. 1-2 seconds.
sfx_critical_hit.style: sound effect, impact, JRPG battle, retro game, 16-bit, heavy hit
